title: Raccoon Removal Franklin Square, Long Island | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Expert raccoon removal in Franklin Square, Long Island. Licensed professionals serving Nassau County. Humane trapping, attic cleanup & exclusion. Call today for fast service!
intro: Franklin Square homeowners know that raccoons are more than just a nuisance—they can cause serious damage to attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Our professional raccoon removal services in Franklin Square provide humane, effective solutions to protect your Long Island property from these persistent pests. With pricing from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, we offer comprehensive removal, exclusion, and cleanup services.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Franklin Square and surrounding Nassau County communities for years with licensed, insured technicians who understand Long Island wildlife patterns. Our same-day emergency response and humane removal methods ensure your home is protected quickly and safely, with warranties on all exclusion work.
localContext: Franklin Square's tree-lined residential streets and proximity to parks like Rath Park create ideal conditions for raccoon activity, especially in attic spaces and garages of the area's many Cape Cod and Colonial-style homes. The neighborhoods around New Hyde Park Road and Hempstead Turnpike frequently experience raccoon issues, particularly during spring nesting season when mothers seek shelter for their young.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Franklin Square typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on factors such as the number of raccoons, location of the nest, extent of damage, and necessary repairs. A single raccoon in an accessible attic may cost around $900–$1,500, while a family of raccoons with extensive attic damage and required exclusion work can reach $3,000–$4,000. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Franklin Square neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Franklin Square due to the area's mature trees, accessible food sources, and residential architecture with attics and crawl spaces. The neighborhoods near Rath Park and along the tree-lined streets off Hempstead Turnpike see frequent raccoon activity, especially in spring and fall. Raccoons are drawn to garbage, pet food, and the shelter provided by Long Island's older homes.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a raccoon emergency in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency raccoon removal services throughout Franklin Square and Nassau County. If you hear scratching in your attic or spot a raccoon on your property, we can typically arrive within 2–4 hours during business hours. For after-hours emergencies, we provide 24/7 service to ensure raccoons are removed quickly before they cause additional damage or pose health risks to your family.

faqs.question: Do you offer raccoon exclusion and damage repair services?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our Franklin Square raccoon removal service includes complete exclusion work to prevent future infestations, including sealing entry points, installing chimney caps, and reinforcing vulnerable areas like roof vents and soffits. We also provide attic cleanup, insulation replacement, and sanitization to remove contaminated materials and odors. All exclusion work comes with a warranty to ensure raccoons don't return.
